form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Addington (30.74) in a Class 4/5, finishing a 5 length fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and six places from 13 starts. Expected to go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Manawatu but the start prior was a strong winner scoring by 5 lengths in a Class 4/5 at Manawatu and clocking an outstanding 25.61 for the 457m trip. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Needs to do more than recent efforts, the latest a sixth over 457m at Manawatu. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (30.66) over 525m at Addington. Has claims on best form.

formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (30.66) over 525m at Addington. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Addington to win by 7 lengths in 30.02, beating Paw Zachary. Last start finished 7th on April 2 over 525m at Addington behind Opawa Hass beaten 8 lengths (30.72) in a Class 5. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Interference final bend tightened shifted out heels and lost ground.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (30.33) over 520m at this track. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at Addington on April 2 over 525m in 29.99. In form and is a must include.

formComments.comment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at Addington on April 2 over 525m in 29.99. In form and is a must include.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Manawatu over 457m in 25.12 last start, beating Criminal Minds. Was strongly supported and ran right away with it last time. Key player and should go well.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (17.31) over 313m at Wanganui Straight. In good form but this is tougher.
